name: the-mindful-way-through-depression-freeing-yourself-from-chronic-unhappiness
description: Williams, Teasdale, Segal, and Kabat-Zinn's MBCT guide — mindfulness-based cognitive therapy to break the cycle of depression and prevent relapse.
useCase: Understand and apply MBCT to break the rumination cycle, prevent depression relapse, and build a daily mindfulness practice.
knownRisks: Not a substitute for medical treatment for major depression
Mindfulness practice can initially bring up difficult emotions
Consult a doctor before stopping or changing medication
